Home IT Services

Top IT Services Companies & Outsourced IT Support

Looking for outsourced IT support? IT services is crucial to fostering innovation, ramping productivity, and improving internal processes. Having a reliable IT service provider by your side ensures your business runs smoothly. Find leading IT services companies, but also check out the best managed service providers, cybersecurity companies, or cloud consulting companies that meet your needs. Or browse IT services near you and in popular locations, such as IT services firms in Canada, IT services agencies in the United States, and IT services companies in the United Kingdom.

    Corporate Technologies is a managed IT services provider that offers comprehensive IT support, infrastructure management, and cybersecurity solutions. Clients consistently praise their responsiveness, professionalism, and ability to meet project deadlines, with approximately 90% of reviews highlighting their effective communication and timely problem resolution. They are recognized for their knowledgeable staff and customized solutions, making them a valuable partner in enhancing operational efficiency.

    See all 11 projects

    Reviews mention Efficient

    Corporate Technologies has received overwhelmingly positive feedback regarding their efficiency. Clients noted significant improvements in IT operations, citing faster response times and increased reliability compared to previous vendors. One client highlighted that support tickets are resolved within the same business day, a marked improvement over prior delays. Their meticulous project management and proactive communication further enhance their reputation for efficiency, making them a trusted partner in critical operations and community initiatives.
    • IT Managed Services for Medical Foundation
      4.5 Oct 16, 2025

      Corporate Technologies has delivered measurable improvements in our IT operations, including faster response times, increased reliability, and stronger system performance. Compared to our previous vendor, where support requests often took several days to receive a response, Corporate Technologies now resolves most support tickets within the same business day. Their proactive monitoring has also helped reduce system downtime and prevent technical disruptions during high-demand events such as Giving Hearts Day, contributing directly to operational continuity and organizational impact.

      Read Full Review
    • IT Managed Services for Medical Foundation
      4.5 Oct 16, 2025

      For day-to-day support and simpler service tickets, they are fast, responsive, and efficient, often resolving issues within the same business day. Throughout every engagement, they communicate proactively—providing updates as work progresses, outlining next steps, and ensuring our team is informed and supported from start to finish.

      Read Full Review

    Reviews mention Helpful

    The feedback from the Civic Association KOLESO ZÁCHRANY highlights Rare Crew's commitment and professionalism in assisting non-profit organizations.     RichBrains is a versatile web and software development company known for its expertise in front-end development, CRM integration, and document management solutions. The company consistently receives positive feedback, with clients praising their project management skills and adaptability. Approximately 100% of reviewers commend RichBrains for their timely project delivery and alignment with client needs, highlighting their impressive capability to manage and execute complex projects effectively.

    See all 5 projects

    Reviews mention Timely

    Overall, clients expressed a highly positive sentiment regarding RichBrains' timeliness in project delivery. For instance, the CTO of AMEC noted that tasks were estimated reasonably and completed on time. Similarly, the Partner of IT Launchpad highlighted that the project management team delivered items on schedule while maintaining open communication. The CIO of Aston Group also confirmed that the majority of tasks were delivered on time, demonstrating RichBrains' commitment to meeting deadlines consistently across various projects.
    • Custom Software Development for IT Consulting Company
      5.0 Apr 16, 2024

      The project management team effectively coordinated the development and implementation of the tool, it was delivered on schedule. They utilized the Agile approach to structure the scope into sprints. Throughout the project, they were open to communication with us, regularly updating on progress and incorporating their feedback to better meet user needs.

      Read Full Review
    • Salesforce CRM Integration for Marketing Consulting Company
      5.0 Apr 11, 2024

      RichBrains demonstrated exceptional project management, delivering all milestones on time and being highly responsive to our feedback and needs.

      Read Full Review
    • Web App Dev & UX/UI Design for Construction Software Co
      5.0 Jul 30, 2025

      Tasks were estimated reasonably and were done on time and on budget in high percentage of cases. Items were delivered on time. RichBrains was able to adjust their workload based on our needs very well, which includes months with 0 work and on a quick notice rebuild a team of multiple people working on the project with high intensity.

      Read Full Review
    • Management System Dev for Construction Company
      5.0 Mar 25, 2024

      Using Scrum at the start of the project, the majority of the tasks were delivered on time. All the issues, new requirements, and enhancements were discussed, absorbed, and developed according to priorities. At the later stage of the project, Rich Brains suggested adopting the Kanban framework to ensure proper prioritisation, management, and delivery of new users and business improvement requests while not compromising the development roadmap of new features for the main system, ACIMS.

      Read Full Review
    • Web Design & Development for Game Development Company
      5.0 Jun 10, 2025

      All stages of the project were executed on a highest level, with no delays in deliverables. Their communication is top-notch, and the whole process has been built to perfectly fit a very tight initial schedule.

      Read Full Review
    Read All Reviews

    Clients consistently highlight N-iX's reliability across various projects.     • E-Commerce Dev for Fashion & Retail Company
      4.0 Mar 16, 2024

      Items were delivered on time. Team responded promptly and effectively. They have a high-quality skill set. Reliable. Thoughtful. Great culture fit.

    • Development Support for Bikesharing Service
      5.0 Sep 20, 2019

      Our bike sharing platform has operated reliably and I don’t remember any significant downtimes during our engagement that have been caused by software. The high reliability of their service stands out to me. Also, we’ve just released Android and iOS apps, and those have become an integral part of our overall architecture.

    • Custom Java Development for Cyber Security Firm
      4.5 May 8, 2015

      They have the same quality level and the same technical skill level, so the only real difference is cost. Then, of course, there is the additional communication issue since they're not here where we are, and their main language is not English. This inevitably leads to a dip in terms of efficiency, but it's still much better and more reliable than our previous partner. I think it's been working extremely well – much better than our prior experience.

      Read Full Review

    Sekurno is a cybersecurity firm specializing in penetration testing and security assessments, providing in-depth evaluations and actionable insights to enhance clients' security postures and compliance. The company receives overwhelmingly positive reviews, with many clients (over 80%) praising their technical proficiency, collaborative approach, and thorough documentation. While some suggest minor improvements in communication, Sekurno is widely recognized for its professionalism and ability to identify critical vulnerabilities.

    See all 25 projects

    Reviews mention Great team

    The feedback regarding Sekurno highlights a strong sentiment towards their team, characterized by professionalism and expertise. Clients noted the well-coordinated team dynamics and proactive support, which facilitated effective collaboration. Overall, the reviews reflect a positive impression of the team's capabilities and dedication to client success.
    • Cybersecurity for Game Studio
      5.0 Feb 25, 2023

      They were prompt and very fast! We had a very ambitious schedule to get the security assessment and pen test started and completed and they made themselves available to consult with our team at all key moments.       5.0 Feb 16, 2021

Sekurno is a great company with very friendly and pleasant employees. We really liked the way they adapted to our working style and made sure that we’re updated at every stage of the project.

      5.0 Jan 25, 2018

      I’ve been in this business for 20 years and worked with numerous developers, and Apriorit is far better than everybody else. They’re clear, articulate, and flexible. If I ask them to get on Skype, they will, even at odd hours. They take on urgent tasks immediately, and they’re honest about their skillsets and limitations. I'm delighted with them. It's been a year and a half, and I have no complaints. They're incredibly fair people.

    See all 14 projects

    Perfsys has demonstrated significant expertise across various industries, including IT Services, Software, Media, Financial Services, and Healthcare. Clients commend their deep knowledge of AWS and cloud architectures, effective project management, and responsiveness. In IT Services, they excelled in data acquisition and restoration. In Software, they showcased strengths in AWS security configurations and cloud infrastructure. Their work in Media focused on enhancing platform performance, while in Financial Services, they improved cloud security. Overall, sentiment is highly positive, highlighting their reliability and technical prowess.

Tell us what you need — we’ll match you with top agencies in minutes.

Get My Matches
Previous 1 2 3 4 5 1119 Next

Why Trust Clutch

At Clutch, we believe trust is the foundation of every business relationship. Our mission is to help buyers make confident, data-backed decisions informed by real client experiences.

Every review on Clutch undergoes a rigorous, human-led verification process to make sure it’s valid. Our team of specialists confirms the identity of each reviewer, ensures the project is legitimate, and only publishes reviews that meet our strict criteria.

Verification doesn’t stop at the point of publication. Our Trust & Safety team routinely audits older reviews against our guidelines. When reviews fall short of our standards, we remove them.

We evaluate service providers using a structured methodology that combines:

  • In-depth client interviews and ratings
  • Comprehensive project details
  • Market presence
  • Portfolio examples and industry recognition

This data powers tools like the Leaders Matrix, which helps you compare agencies directly. Our research team curates rankings by weighing verified reviews most heavily, so the most trusted and experienced providers rise to the top.

Using this unique combination of verified client feedback and provider-supplied insights, Clutch distills the most important details into clear, digestible summaries so you have everything you need to make confident, informed decisions quickly.

We take fraud seriously. Providers who violate our guidelines may face lower rankings, restricted visibility, or removal from the platform altogether.

Clutch’s commitment to transparency is ongoing. We’re constantly refining our systems to protect the integrity of reviews and support you in finding the right agency.

Ability to deliver
Focus
Clutch Leaders Matrix

15 Ray Business Technologies

A Clutch Leaders Matrix provides a broad view of the top-performing companies in a particular service or location. Each company featured in a Leaders Matrix is evaluated based on Focus and Ability to Deliver. The size of each circle indicates that company’s size.

By using verified reviews, focused service details, and real project data, the Leaders Matrix highlights companies that consistently deliver and stand out from the rest. Each company’s position is based on how well they focus on a service area and how consistently they deliver results, helping you make informed, confident decisions. Learn More

Focus (x-axis)

Focus accounts for a company’s specialization within a certain service.

Ability to Deliver (y-axis)

Ability to Deliver considers three criteria:

  1. Client feedback and reviews
  2. Work experience and previous projects
  3. Market presence and reputation in the industry

IT Services Lead Generation

Top IT Services Agencies

An IT services company manages the technology that powers your organization. Depending on the engagement, the firm might handle day-to-day help desk tickets, secure your network, migrate workloads to the cloud, or design long-term infrastructure roadmaps. Think of them as an extension of your internal team, dedicated to keeping systems running, data protected, and users supported.

IT services providers offer these types of services:

  • Managed services (24/7 monitoring, patching, user support)
  • Cybersecurity (penetration testing, SOC, incident response)
  • Cloud consulting (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud architecture)
  • Network design and virtualization
  • Data backup and disaster recovery
  • IT strategy and digital transformation advisory

Some agencies also offer hardware procurement or staff augmentation for specialized projects.

Pricing depends on scope, complexity, and geography. Clutch data shows:

  • Hourly rates: $75–$200 for on-shore talent; $25–$75 for offshore teams
  • Managed service retainers: $1,000–$10,000+ per month, based on user count and SLA levels
  • Project-based engagements (e.g., cloud migration): $10,000–$250,000+

Always request a detailed statement of work that ties milestones to costs.

Start by mapping your pain points, such as security gaps, legacy systems, scalability needs, and short-listing vendors with matching expertise. Review Clutch profiles for certifications (e.g., Microsoft Partner, SOC 2), industries served, and real-world results. Schedule discovery calls, verify cultural fit, and ask for client references who faced similar challenges. Finally, compare proposals for transparency in pricing, metrics, and SLAs.

Be cautious if a provider showcases any of these:

  • Guarantees 100% uptime” without clear contingencies
  • Can’t explain their security posture or compliance framework
  • Offers one-size-fits-all packages with no customization
  • Provides vague timelines or refuses to document responsibilities
  • Has limited or unverifiable client feedback

Lack of transparency usually signals larger operational issues.

These are some of the key questions you should ask before hiring an IT services provider:

  • What certifications do your engineers hold?
  • How do you monitor and report on system health and security incidents?
  • Can you share case studies relevant to our industry and tech stack?
  • What is your average response and resolution time for critical tickets?
  • How do you handle onboarding, knowledge transfer, and documentation?
  • Will we retain ownership of all data, configurations, and cloud accounts?

Engaging in a detailed Q&A session helps ensure expectations are aligned before you sign the contract.
